arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Vinicius Jr has 'already been told' he has won the Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr is among the favourites to win the Ballon d'Or this year after his stunning season for Real Madrid and reports from Spain claim that he has 'already been told' that he has won the award

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid could offer £40m player to Arsenal in a swap deal for William Saliba
arts.sum: William Saliba is a very special player, and Arsenal are very lucky to have him. The Frenchman is undoubtedly one of the best in the...

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham 'not in favour' of resting after fresh shoulder injury
arts.sum: And while AS reported the following day that he was in "severe pain" and waiting to see how he responded on Monday, Carlo Ancelotti declared in a pre-match press conference ahead of Tuesday night's upcoming La Liga game against Alaves that there is no lasting damage and no concern over Bellingham's availability. Bellingham missed one Madrid game last November when he dislocated his shoulder, with the decision made, and since stuck to, to treat it without surgery.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have to heed Real Madrid warning or stadium deal could be in jeopardy
arts.sum: Daniel Levy will understand that Tottenham have one of the best football grounds not just in the Premier League but in the whole of Europe. A ground that can host a variety of other events than its main purpose. Indeed, we’ve already seen American football take place in that part of North London, and there […] The post Tottenham have to heed Real Madrid warning or stadium deal could be in jeopardy appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior to be Crowned 2024 Ballon dOr Winner
arts.sum: The winner of the 2024 Ballon d'Or has reportedly been informed ahead of October's ceremony.

arts.ttl: Endrick’s great form could come at a cost: Real Madrid set to pay hefty bonuses
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s Brazilian wonderkid Endrick is finally starting to find a bit of form for Los Blancos, despite still not getting many minutes. The 18-year-old has managed to net twice…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Alaves 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Alaves in what should be yet another manageable game for Los Blancos ahead of the crucial Madrid Derby against Atletico, which will be played at the Metropolitano next Sunday. Real Madrid have what it takes to be considered the heavy favorites here, so they should complete a solid performance en route to a convincing win ahead of the Derby.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Deportivo Alaves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are in midweek La Liga action as they welcome early-season surprise package Deportivo Alaves to the Bernabeu on Tuesday night. Alaves are aiming to snap Madrid's lengthy La Liga unbeaten run which was extended to 38 games at the weekend with a hard-fought 4-1 victory over Espanyol .
